creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Seen in a Jenkins run (the frequency is low): https://jenkins.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD_HEAD-tests2/557/testReport/junit/lib.libthr/detach_test/pthread_detach/

We've seen this at Isilon as well from time to time. The test is potentially buggy, but more investigation is needed.
